description: Contradictory deadlines (4 Sep vs 11 Sep), vague insurance level, weightings 20+25+25 labelled as totalling 60. Should trigger clarification suggestions and uncertain statuses, not invention.

expected.verbatim: The submission deadline is 4 September 2026 at 12:00 noon.
the tender submission deadline is 11 September 2026 at 12:00 noon
The Supplier shall hold adequate public liability insurance commensurate with the risk profile of the services.
